sections.paragraph:
prop. to make smooth (see קֶרַח ice); specially to make bald. קָרַח קָרְחָה to make a bald place, Lev 21:5 Mic 1:16. (Hence, with the letters softened, is formed the root גָּלַח which see.)

Niphal, to be made bald, followed by לְ on account of any one who is dead, Jer 16:6.

Hiphil, i.q. Kal, Eze 27:31.

Hophal, pass. מֻקְרָח made bald, Eze 29:18.

The derivatives, קָרֵחַ-קָרַחַת immediately follow.
